description: Per-pair top-1-vs-top-2 logit margin (Q16.16) for the live OpenEvidence cache. Surfaces whether the BitNet classifier is confidently right, uncertainly right, uncertainly wrong, or confidently wrong. The 'uncertainly wrong' bucket is the deferral-friendly case — small margin → upstream layer (RxNorm / OpenEvidence / 5-LLM consensus) decides.
name: ClinicalMem BitNet Layer 4.5 Calibration / Margin Diagnostic
